name: agregarr
tagline: An RSS aggregator for collecting, organizing, and reading feeds
description: Agregarr is a self-hosted RSS feed aggregator built to help users follow news, blogs, and content in an organized interface. It features a clean web UI, tag-based sorting, and easy syncing. Designed for minimal setup and personal use.

features.title: Content Aggregation
features.description: Collects media information from multiple external sources

features.title: RSS and API Integration
features.description: Pulls data from feeds and APIs into a unified view

features.title: Filtering Rules
features.description: Filters aggregated content based on defined criteria

features.title: Automated Updates
features.description: Refreshes data sources on a scheduled basis
